alt_text: A clean, single-page visualization for the stark-skill-analytics skill with a centered title and usage badge, three summary cards for inputs and outputs, a color-coded vertical workflow diagram from history files to report generation, command examples for quick start and common modes, tables for arguments and input/output files, cards explaining rankings, timelines, quality signals, and recommendations, plus a failure-handling table and a closing callout that this skill reads history and produces markdown insights."}}
